# ClaudeThings

> ClaudeThings is a paid toolkit for [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code) that drops a full AI engineering and marketing team into any project with one command — 89 specialized agents, 103 pre-built skills, and 181 slash commands. It works with any tech stack, adapts to your conventions via a CLAUDE.md file, and ships as two kits (Engineer + Marketing) you can install separately or together.

ClaudeThings is an independent, unofficial product. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Anthropic. "Claude" and "Claude Code" are trademarks of Anthropic. It is delivered as a private GitHub repository and installed with a one-line `npx github:claudethings/… init` command (no npm publish, no global install; Node 18+).

## What you get

- 89 specialized agents (58 engineering + 31 marketing)
- 103 pre-built skills (61 engineering + 42 marketing)
- 181 slash commands (159 engineering + 32 marketing; 10 shared docs commands counted once)
- Two kits: Engineer (the software team) and Marketing (the growth team)
- CLAUDE.md templates so agents learn your stack, conventions, and brand voice
- The `claudethings` installer CLI; cherry-pick any single agent, skill, or command
- Lifetime updates: buy once, run `claudethings update` (or `git pull`) forever

## Kits

- [Engineer kit](https://claudethings.com/#kits): 58 agents, 61 skills, 159 commands. Includes tech-lead, backend-architect, react-specialist, typescript-pro, python-pro, golang-pro, rust-pro, postgres-pro, kubernetes-specialist, terraform-specialist, sre-engineer, code-reviewer, test-automator, debugger, security-auditor, and commands like /api-scaffold, /test-coverage, /deploy-checklist.
- [Marketing kit](https://claudethings.com/#kits): 31 agents, 42 skills, 32 commands. Includes growth-strategist, brand-voice, seo-specialist, content-marketer, competitive-analyst, market-researcher, and commands like /campaign-brief, /blog-post, /email-sequence, /landing-page, /launch-plan.

## Pricing

- [Engineer](https://claudethings.com/#pricing): $49 one-time, lifetime updates.
- [Marketing](https://claudethings.com/#pricing): $49 one-time, lifetime updates.
- [Complete Bundle](https://claudethings.com/#pricing): $89 one-time (normally $129), both kits, all 89 agents / 103 skills / 181 commands.
- Every plan: one-time payment, lifetime updates, private-repo delivery, 14-day money-back guarantee. Secure checkout via Polar.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://claudethings.com/): product overview, what's inside, kits, pricing, FAQ.
- [Free tools](https://claudethings.com/tools): free browser tools and Claude skills for people building with Claude Code.
- [Pricing](https://claudethings.com/#pricing): plans and what each includes.
- [FAQ](https://claudethings.com/#faq): what you get, framework lock-in, updates, refunds.

## Free tools

- [SKILL.md Validator](https://claudethings.com/claude-skill-md-validator): paste a Claude Code SKILL.md and instantly lint the YAML frontmatter, name and description rules, body length, and when-to-use structure, with the exact fixes. Runs 100% in your browser.
- [Website Security Audit](https://claudethings.com/claude-skill-for-website-security-audit): a free Claude skill that audits your own website or codebase for missing HTTPS, exposed files, hardcoded secrets, and vulnerable dependencies, then returns a prioritized plain-English fix-it report.

## Free resources (guides & prompt library)

- [Claude prompt library](https://claudethings.com/prompts): 50 field-tested Claude prompts across five collections, each with the reasoning for why it works.
- [Claude prompts for data analysis](https://claudethings.com/prompts/claude-prompts-for-data-analysis): 10 prompts — dataset profiling, hypothesis-first analysis, SQL with guardrails, statistical sanity checks, executive translation.
- [Claude prompts for writing](https://claudethings.com/prompts/claude-prompts-for-writing): 10 prompts — voice-matched drafts, ruthless editing, de-AI-ifying text, structure diagnosis, titles.
- [Claude prompts for business](https://claudethings.com/prompts/claude-prompts-for-business): 10 prompts — strategy red-teaming, pricing decisions, negotiation prep, hiring scorecards, decision journals.
- [Claude prompts for coding](https://claudethings.com/prompts/claude-prompts-for-coding): 10 prompts — hypothesis-driven debugging, adversarial code review, refactoring plans, bug-hunting tests, security pre-flight.
- [Claude prompts for marketing](https://claudethings.com/prompts/claude-prompts-for-marketing): 10 prompts — positioning, landing pages, customer-language mining, email sequences, SEO briefs, ad variants.
- [Blog](https://claudethings.com/blog): practical guides for building with Claude.
- [Getting started with Claude Code](https://claudethings.com/blog/getting-started-with-claude-code): install to first shipped feature — CLAUDE.md, permissions, skills, workflow habits.
- [How to build AI agents with Claude](https://claudethings.com/blog/how-to-build-ai-agents-with-claude): the agent loop, tool use, MCP, Agent SDK, and reliability practices, with code.
- [10 prompting techniques for Claude](https://claudethings.com/blog/10-prompting-techniques-for-claude): context front-loading, examples, XML tags, chain-of-thought, role prompts, and more, each with before/after.
- [7 Claude prompts for smarter investing](https://claudethings.com/blog/7-claude-prompts-for-smarter-investing): research workflows (annual reports, thesis red-teaming, decision journals) — educational, not financial advice.
- [Use cases](https://claudethings.com/use-cases): honest, role-by-role maps of where Claude changes real work.
- [Claude for developers](https://claudethings.com/use-cases/claude-for-developers) · [Claude for data scientists](https://claudethings.com/use-cases/claude-for-data-scientists) · [Claude for product managers](https://claudethings.com/use-cases/claude-for-product-managers) · [Claude for students](https://claudethings.com/use-cases/claude-for-students)
- [Comparisons](https://claudethings.com/comparisons): hype-free tool comparisons with bias disclosed.
- [Claude vs ChatGPT](https://claudethings.com/comparisons/claude-vs-chatgpt) · [Claude Sonnet vs Opus](https://claudethings.com/comparisons/claude-sonnet-vs-opus) · [Claude vs GitHub Copilot](https://claudethings.com/comparisons/claude-vs-copilot)
- [Claude coding tools guide](https://claudethings.com/tools/claude-coding-tools): the 2026 stack — Claude Code, IDE surfaces, MCP connectors, skills layer.
- [Claude MCP servers guide](https://claudethings.com/tools/claude-mcp-servers): what MCP is, the connector categories worth installing, and how to add them safely.
- [Claude productivity tools guide](https://claudethings.com/tools/claude-productivity-tools): Projects, Artifacts, connectors, skills, and power-user habits.
